summary.lv: Clarity Labs SIA meklē Mid Python Developer SAP CPQ konfigurācijai un pielāgošanai klientiem, izmantojot Python, JavaScript un REST/SOAP API. Darbs klātienē Rīgā, atalgojums €2200–3200 mēnesī.
summary.en: Clarity Labs SIA is seeking a Mid Python Developer to configure and customize SAP CPQ for clients using Python, JavaScript, and REST/SOAP APIs in an on-site role in Riga, offering €2,200–3,200/month.
